text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has made amazing strides<n>these past
few years, earning us both<n>a well-deserved
break.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I receive an invite from Tazuna to<n>watch a race,
so I make my way to<n>the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah... Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: This isn't the time we agreed on.<n>You're early!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's true. I just couldn't<n>wait!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well, let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Today was as exciting asever! But that's to be expected from aG1 race!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly! I could swear the ground<n>was
shaking from all the cheering at<n>one point!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The excitement, the emotion...<n>There's no
denying it—races are<n>wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thanks for accepting my invitation<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to take this<n>opportunity to
express my gratitude to<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You and <chrname> have swept<n>through race
after race these past<n>three years.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Watching both of your efforts always<n>made my
heart leap with excitement,<n>whether it was in
person or on TV.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've witnessed so many miraculous<n>moments
because of you... It's like<n>something from a
dream.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So, once again... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and please keep striving towards<n>the future!
Injury free, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's good to hear! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to watch over you two<n>from here on
out!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...From just a little closer than ever. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, we meet up with <chrname> and<n>enjoy the
next race together.
